title: Section 17
content: 1[17. Other officers.--(1) All officers of the University, other than the Acharya (Chancellor), the Upacharya (Vice-Chancellor) and the Karma-Sachiva (Registrar), shall be appointed in such manner, for such term and on such emoluments and other conditions of service as may be prescribed by the Statutes. (2) The powers and functions of the officers appointed under sub-section (1) shall be such as may be prescribed by the Statutes.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 31 of 1984, s. 11, for sections 16 and 17 (w.e.f. 8-8-1984).
